extract: Zorua (Japanese: ゾロア Zorua) is a Dark-type Pokémon introduced in Generation V. It evolves into Zoroark starting at level 30. In Hisui, Zorua has a dual-type Normal/Ghost regional form. It evolves into Hisuian Zoroark starting at level 30. Both it and Zoroark were the first Generation V Pokémon to be revealed to the public on February 10, 2010.
